landing.headline: The Operating System for Diaspora Shipping
landing.subheadline: Run your shipping business like a pro. Digital intake, batch tracking, WhatsApp notifications, and customer management — all in one platform.
landing.proofLine: Trusted by parcel forwarders, bus agencies, and container shippers across 50+ countries
landing.whoBusDesc: Digitize your parcel counter. Lagos→Abuja, Douala→Yaoundé, Accra→Kumasi — manage parcels on every route.
landing.whoForwardersDesc: Replace paper receipts and phone calls. Your customers get WhatsApp tracking on every shipment.
landing.whoContainersDesc: Manage consolidation from Houston to Lagos or London to Accra. Manifests, labels, and collection tracking built in.
landing.howStep1Desc: Customer walks in, you type their phone number, the system remembers them. Create a shipment with a tracking number instantly.
landing.howStep2Desc: Group shipments into batches, lock the batch, one click ships everything. All customers get WhatsApp notifications automatically.
landing.howStep3Desc: Parcels arrive at destination. Staff marks them collected. Only uncollected customers get smart pickup reminders.
landing.howStep4Desc: Payment tracking, insurance, reports, and analytics. Everything a professional logistics company needs to scale.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Run a Professional Operation
landing.feat1Desc: Type a phone number, instantly pull up their name, history, and frequent receivers.
landing.feat2Desc: Automatic updates for shipment created, in transit, arrived, and collected. All tiers.
landing.feat3Desc: Professional printable labels with QR codes. Customers scan to track their shipment live.
landing.feat4Desc: Group shipments by flight or container. One-click status updates notify all customers at once.
landing.feat5Desc: Full interface and customer notifications in English and French. Perfect for African corridors.
landing.feat6Desc: Manage origin and destination offices. Staff at each location can process their side of the operation.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to professionalize your shipping business?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start free — no credit card required.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no per-shipment charges.
pricing.faq1Q: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricing.faq1A: No. The Free plan requires no credit card. Just sign up and start managing shipments immediately.
pricing.faq2A: Yes! We offer prepaid coupon codes that work like phone cards. Purchase a code from a CarryMatch agent and enter it in your dashboard to activate Pro.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. The entire interface and all customer notifications are available in English and French, with one-click language switching.
pricing.faq4A: Absolutely. CarryMatch is designed for any shipping operation — airline luggage consolidators, container shippers, and bus agency parcel services.
pricing.faq5Q: What shipping corridors do you support?
pricing.faq5A: CarryMatch is corridor-agnostic. Whether you ship US→Cameroon, UK→Nigeria, France→Senegal, or any other route globally, the platform works for you.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start managing your shipments in minutes.
signup.successBody: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your CarryMatch dashboard.

apply.title: Partner application
apply.description: Signed-in users without a vendor record can submit their Phase 1 CML partner application here.
apply.signInPrompt: Create an account or log in first to submit your partner application in the rebuild path.
apply.helper: This saves the real launch-core application record. Approval still happens later outside this slice.
apply.monthlyVolumeHelp: Enter an estimated number of shipments or parcels per month using digits only.
apply.corridorsHelp: Add one main corridor per line so review can read it quickly.
apply.corridorsHint: One corridor per line, for example: Douala to Yaounde
apply.officeAddressesHelp: Add one office location per line. Include city or neighborhood when useful.
apply.successBody: Your application was saved and is now waiting for review.
apply.resubmitSuccessBody: Your updated application was resubmitted and is now waiting for review again.
apply.existingApplicationBody: This account already has an application record. Open the status screen to see the current review state.
apply.rejectedApplicationBody: This application was rejected earlier. You can correct the details below and submit it again for review.
apply.heroSubtitle: Apply to join our network of professional shipping vendors. Get digital intake, batch tracking, WhatsApp notifications, and everything you need to run like a pro.

applicationStatus.title: Application status
applicationStatus.description: This page reads your real application and vendor state from Supabase and keeps dashboard access gated until you are ready.
applicationStatus.pendingBody: You cannot access the vendor dashboard yet.
applicationStatus.rejectedBody: Dashboard access stays blocked until this application is reviewed again.
applicationStatus.suspendedBody: Dashboard access is blocked while this account remains suspended.
applicationStatus.defaultBody: We could not match this account to a current application or vendor state.
applicationStatus.pendingNextStep: An admin review still happens outside this slice. Once your application is approved, routing will send you to setup.
applicationStatus.rejectedNextStep: You can update the application details and resubmit from this screen when you are ready.
applicationStatus.suspendedNextStep: Suspension review is intentionally not built in this slice, so this screen only explains the current state.
applicationStatus.defaultNextStep: If this looks wrong, refresh your session after the underlying record is corrected.
applicationStatus.noApplicationBody: This account does not have a saved application yet.

setup.title: First-login setup wizard
setup.description: Approved vendors complete the minimum launch-core setup here before they enter the dashboard.
setup.sectionOneHelp: Set the business name and 3-letter tracking prefix that will identify this vendor in launch-core records.
setup.sectionTwo: Main origin office and pickup office setup
setup.sectionTwoHelp: Start with the main office your shipments usually leave from, then list the pickup or destination offices customers will use later.
setup.sectionThreeHelp: Choose your starting defaults here. You can still adjust price, fees, and insurance later during shipment intake.
setup.companyNameHelp: This starts with the approved application name when available, but you can adjust it before saving if the operating name should differ.
setup.vendorPrefixHelp: Use exactly 3 letters. This prefix appears in tracking numbers, for example CML.
setup.vendorPrefixError: Enter exactly 3 letters for the vendor prefix.
setup.defaultOriginCountryHelp: Choose the country for your main or origin office so the setup stores a clean filterable location value.
setup.defaultOriginCountryError: Select the country for the main / origin office.
setup.defaultOriginCityHelp: Enter the city for the office where most shipments begin.
setup.destinationBranchesHelp: Add each pickup office with a clear office name, country, city, and address so customers and staff can identify the right destination later. Example: Yaounde Pickup Office, CM, Yaounde, Mvan near Total station.
setup.destinationBranchesHint: Add each office separately with a name, country, city, and address.
setup.destinationOfficesEmpty: No pickup office has been added yet. Add at least one pickup / destination office before you complete setup.
setup.destinationOfficesRequired: Add at least one pickup / destination office before completing setup.
setup.destinationOfficeNameHelp: Use the name staff and customers will recognize later when they choose or confirm a pickup office.
setup.destinationOfficeNameError: Enter the office name for this pickup / destination office.
setup.destinationOfficeCountryHelp: Choose the country where this pickup office operates so destination selection can stay clean later.
setup.destinationOfficeCountryError: Select the country for this pickup / destination office.
setup.destinationOfficeCityHelp: Enter the city for this pickup office so shipment intake can prefill destination city more reliably later.
setup.destinationOfficeCityError: Enter the city for this pickup / destination office.
setup.destinationOfficeAddressPlaceholder: For example: Mvan, near Total station
setup.destinationOfficeAddressHelp: Add the address or location details customers will need to find this office.
setup.destinationOfficeAddressError: Enter the address for this pickup / destination office.
setup.pricingModelHelp: Choose the default method you want to start from. You can still change the actual shipment price or add fees later during intake.
setup.insuranceModelHelp: Choose the default insurance approach you want to start from. You can still adjust declared value or insurance per shipment later.
setup.defaultsNoticeBody: You are choosing how pricing and insurance should start by default. Your team can still adjust price, extra fees, and insurance later during shipment intake.
setup.successBody: Your vendor records were saved and this account is now active.
setup.approvedNoticeBody: This setup flow writes the minimal vendor, owner, and branch records needed for launch-core access.

dashboard.title: Vendor dashboard
dashboard.description: This is the launch-core dashboard shell for active vendors. Shipment, batch, billing, and notification work stays out of this slice.
dashboard.shipmentIntakeBody: Start a real shipment from here with vendor-scoped customer lookup and a generated tracking number.
dashboard.scanUpdateBody: Retrieve a shipment fast by tracking number or QR and use one safe quick action from the result card.
dashboard.batchManagementBody: Group pending shipments into operational batches and move the first core batch states forward here.
dashboard.businessManagementBody: Manage your existing business details here without re-running onboarding.
dashboard.notificationLogBody: Review the real notification events the platform is recording and set the first vendor-level notification defaults here.
dashboard.todoBody: Dashboard metrics and operational widgets are intentionally deferred until the next feature slices begin.
dashboard.quickScanDesc: Scan a tracking label to update status.

vendorSettings.title: Vendor settings / company profile
vendorSettings.description: Active vendors can update the core business details and pricing defaults already saved during onboarding.
vendorSettings.cardDescription: Keep your business name, tracking prefix, main origin office details, and pricing defaults up to date.
vendorSettings.companyNameHelp: Update the operating business name that should appear across the active vendor record.
vendorSettings.companyNameError: Enter the company name before saving.
vendorSettings.defaultOriginCityError: Enter the main / origin office city before saving.
vendorSettings.pricingDefaultsDescription: Set the starting pricing rule and currency you want intake to use automatically. Staff can still override the shipment price later when needed.
vendorSettings.pricingModelHelp: Choose how intake should start pricing new shipments by default.
vendorSettings.pricingModelError: Select the default pricing model before saving.
vendorSettings.defaultCurrencyHelp: Choose the vendor's default pricing currency. CarryMatch saves only the clean 3-letter currency code.
vendorSettings.ratePerKgHelp: Required only when the pricing model is per kilogram. Intake will calculate base price as weight × rate.
vendorSettings.ratePerKgError: Enter a valid rate per kilogram greater than zero.
vendorSettings.flatFeePerItemHelp: Required only when the pricing model is flat fee. Intake will calculate base price as quantity × flat fee.
vendorSettings.flatFeePerItemError: Enter a valid flat fee per item greater than zero.
vendorSettings.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed for business settings.
vendorSettings.successBody: Your active vendor record was updated successfully.

branchManagement.title: Branch management
branchManagement.description: Manage the pickup / destination offices your active business uses after onboarding, including the country and city for each branch.
branchManagement.helperBody: This page edits the real vendor branch records already linked to the active business so each office has a usable country, city, and address.
branchManagement.actionsHelp: Add, edit, or remove pickup / destination offices, then save when the list looks right.
branchManagement.emptyBody: This active vendor does not have any saved pickup / destination offices yet.
branchManagement.branchCardHelp: Keep the office name and address clear for later operations.
branchManagement.officeNameHelp: Use the office name customers and staff will recognize later.
branchManagement.officeNameError: Enter the office name for this branch.
branchManagement.countryHelp: Choose the country for this office so the branch can be filtered and grouped correctly later.
branchManagement.countryError: Select the country for this branch.
branchManagement.cityHelp: Enter the city for this office so destination selection can prefill city more reliably later.
branchManagement.cityError: Enter the city for this branch.
branchManagement.addressHelp: Add the address or location details customers will need to find this branch.
branchManagement.addressError: Enter the address for this branch.
branchManagement.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed for branch management.
branchManagement.minOneBranchError: Keep at least one saved pickup / destination branch so shipment intake does not lose its real destination branch options.
branchManagement.successBody: Your branch list was saved successfully.

notifications.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed for notification visibility and settings.
notifications.logDescription: Review the real notification event records already being generated for this vendor before delivery sending goes live.
notifications.logCardDescription: This log shows the vendor-scoped notification records currently being captured from shipment and batch activity.
notifications.loadingBody: Loading the recorded notification events for this vendor.
notifications.emptyBody: Notification records will appear here once shipment and batch actions trigger real events.
notifications.settingsDescription: Set the first vendor-level notification defaults here while real event recording continues underneath for later delivery integration.
notifications.settingsCardDescription: Save the minimum vendor-level notification choices now so later sending can reuse the same foundation cleanly.
notifications.notificationsEnabledHelp: This is the vendor-level sending toggle for the future delivery layer. Internal event recording still continues so your log stays complete.
notifications.defaultPlannedChannelHelp: Choose which channel future delivery should prefer by default when both contact paths exist.
notifications.recordingNoticeTitle: Internal event capture is already live
notifications.recordingNoticeBody: CarryMatch is already recording structured notification events from real shipment and batch actions. This page saves the vendor-level defaults that future Meta and email sending can use later.
notifications.metaPlaceholderBody: Company-owned Meta Business Manager, WABA, number, templates, and delivery wiring stay for a later slice. This page only prepares the vendor-facing foundation.
notifications.emailPlaceholderBody: Fallback provider connection and template rules stay for a later slice. This page only stores the vendor-level default channel choice.
notifications.saveSuccess: Your notification settings were saved successfully.

shippingLabel.title: Shipping label
shippingLabel.scanToTrack: Scan or open this tracking link

scanUpdate.title: Scan / Update
scanUpdate.description: Open a real shipment quickly by tracking number or QR so front-desk and ops staff can move faster.
scanUpdate.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed for scan and update.
scanUpdate.trackingPlaceholder: Enter or scan the tracking number
scanUpdate.trackingHelp: You can enter the tracking number directly or paste the public tracking URL from the QR label.
scanUpdate.trackingRequired: Enter or scan a tracking number first.
scanUpdate.lookupDescription: Use manual entry first, then scan a QR code when the browser and device camera support it cleanly.
scanUpdate.scannerDescription: Use the device camera to scan the shipment QR code when browser support is available. Manual tracking entry always stays available.
scanUpdate.scannerUnavailableBody: This browser or device does not expose native QR scanning cleanly yet, so use manual tracking lookup on this page for now.
scanUpdate.scannerStartFailed: We could not start the camera scanner. Check camera permissions and try again.
scanUpdate.scannerReadFailed: We could not read a valid QR code from the camera feed right now.
scanUpdate.scanInvalidResult: The scanned QR result did not contain a usable tracking value.
scanUpdate.resultDescription: Once a shipment is found, this card gives the key operational facts plus a quick link to the full shipment detail.
scanUpdate.emptyBody: Find a shipment by tracking number or QR and the operational result will appear here.
scanUpdate.notFoundBody: We could not find a shipment for that tracking number inside this active vendor account.
scanUpdate.destinationBranchMissing: No destination branch saved on this shipment
scanUpdate.quickCollectSuccess: The shipment was marked as collected successfully.
scanUpdate.quickActionHelp: Quick collect only appears when the shipment is already in pickup or last-mile stage. Use full shipment detail for broader updates.

batches.listDescription: View, create, and open the operational batches your active business is using.
batches.summaryBody: Keep batch creation and daily grouping moving from one place, then open each batch to assign shipments and update status.
batches.summaryCreateHint: Create a new batch when operations is ready to group pending shipments and set an ETA.
batches.existingDescription: These are the real batches already saved for your active vendor record.
batches.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed for batch management.
batches.emptyBody: Create the first operational batch once you are ready to group pending shipments.
batches.batchNamePlaceholder: For example: Douala to Yaounde - April run
batches.batchNameHelp: Use a practical batch name your operations team will recognize later.
batches.batchNameError: Enter the batch name before saving.
batches.etaHelp: Optional. Add the expected arrival time only if you already know it.
batches.etaDateHelp: Optional. Choose the expected arrival date for this batch.
batches.etaDateError: Add the ETA date if you want to save a time.
batches.etaTimeHelp: Optional. Add the expected arrival time once the date is set.
batches.etaTimeError: Add the ETA time if you want to save an ETA date.
batches.etaPreviewEmpty: No ETA has been set for this batch yet.
batches.etaPropagationHelp: This batch ETA becomes the main operational ETA shown on linked shipment detail and public tracking.
batches.createDescription: Start a new batch with a name and optional ETA, then add pending shipments after it is saved.
batches.detailDescription: Manage one operational batch, assign pending shipments, and move the first core batch states forward.
batches.batchDetailsDescription: Keep the batch name and ETA clear so the rest of the team can understand this run.
batches.createPanelBody: Save the batch basics here first. Once the record exists, you can start assigning pending shipments right away.
batches.createPanelNext: This screen keeps the first batch setup lean: save the batch, review the ETA, then move into shipment assignment.
batches.createPanelStepOne: 1. Save the batch name and optional ETA.
batches.createPanelStepTwo: 2. Add pending shipments once the batch record exists.
batches.createPanelStepThree: 3. Move the batch through status changes as operations progress.
batches.saveCreateHint: Create the batch record first. Shipment assignment and status changes open on the next screen.
batches.saveEditHint: Save any change to the batch name or ETA here, then use the status and shipment sections below to manage the run.
batches.detailsLockedNotice: This batch is locked. Reopen it first if you need to add a missed shipment, remove a shipment, or update the batch details.
batches.detailsReadOnlyNotice: This batch has already moved beyond the open stage, so batch details stay read-only here.
batches.saveSuccess: The batch details were saved successfully.
batches.statusSuccess: The batch status was updated successfully.
batches.reopenSuccess: The batch was reopened and can be edited again.
batches.addShipmentSuccess: The shipment was added to the batch successfully.
batches.removeShipmentSuccess: The shipment was removed from the batch successfully.
batches.notFoundBody: We could not find a saved batch for this vendor and route.
batches.statusSectionDescription: Move the batch forward only through the next practical statuses for this slice.
batches.statusActionsDescription: Use only the next status actions shown here so the batch stays aligned with the current operational flow.

receivingStageDescriptions.arrived: This batch has reached the receiving side. Move it into pickup or last-mile stage once the branch is ready for the next handoff.
receivingStageDescriptions.ready_for_pickup: These shipments are now ready at the receiving branch. Mark each shipment as collected as customers pick up.
receivingStageDescriptions.out_for_last_mile_delivery: These shipments are already on the final local delivery leg. Mark each shipment as collected once handoff is complete.

batches.receivingSummaryDescription: Use these counts to see what is waiting at the branch, what is already on last-mile handling, and what has already been collected.
batches.delayEtaDescription: Delayed and customs-hold batches need a revised ETA before the new status is saved.

delayEtaDescriptions.delayed: This batch is delayed. Save the latest ETA here so linked shipments and public tracking both show the current estimate.
delayEtaDescriptions.customs_hold: This batch is in customs hold. Save the latest ETA here so linked shipments and public tracking both show the current estimate.

batches.delayEtaDateHelp: Choose the revised arrival date that should become the active ETA for this batch.
batches.delayEtaTimeHelp: Choose the revised arrival time that should become the active ETA for this batch.
batches.delayEtaDateError: Add the revised ETA date if you want to save a revised ETA time.
batches.delayEtaTimeError: Add the revised ETA time if you want to save a revised ETA date.
batches.delayEtaRequired: Add the revised ETA date and time before saving this delay update.
batches.saveEtaAndChangePrefix: Save ETA and change status to
batches.delayEtaUpdateSuccess: The revised ETA was saved successfully.
batches.delayStatusSuccess: The batch status and revised ETA were saved successfully.
batches.reopenBody: Use this only when a shipment was missed or a correction is needed before the batch progresses further. Reopening returns the batch to open so you can edit details and shipment assignment again.
batches.noFurtherStatusActions: No further status changes are available for this batch in the current slice.
batches.inBatchDescription: These shipments are already grouped into the current batch.
batches.inBatchEmpty: No shipments have been added to this batch yet. Add pending shipments from the panel on the right when you are ready.
batches.availableShipmentsDescription: Only pending shipments that are not already assigned to another batch appear here.
batches.availableShipmentsEmpty: There are no pending shipments available to add right now. Create more shipments first if this run still needs items.
batches.assignmentLockedNotice: Shipment assignment is only available while the batch is open. Reopen a locked batch first if you need to make corrections.
batches.markCollectedSuccess: The shipment was marked as collected.
batches.pickupManagementDescription: Use this list to see what is waiting for pickup or onward delivery and mark each completed handoff as collected.

shipmentIntake.title: New shipment intake
shipmentIntake.description: Create the first real shipment record for your active business with lean customer lookup and intake details.
shipmentIntake.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed to create a shipment.
shipmentIntake.lookupDescription: Search the active vendor customer list by sender phone before entering new sender details.
shipmentIntake.lookupPhoneRequiredBody: Enter a valid sender phone number before running customer lookup.
shipmentIntake.lookupNotFoundBody: No existing sender record matched this phone number. Continue entering sender details inline.
shipmentIntake.senderSectionHelp: If lookup does not find a customer, complete the sender details here and they will be saved in vendor scope.
shipmentIntake.senderNameHelp: Use the name the vendor team should see for this sender.
shipmentIntake.senderEmailHelp: Optional. Add an email only if the sender uses it.
shipmentIntake.receiverSectionHelp: Capture the basic receiver contact details for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.receiverNameHelp: Use the name the receiving branch should recognize.
shipmentIntake.receiverEmailHelp: Optional. Add an email only if the receiver uses it.
shipmentIntake.shipmentSectionHelp: Keep this first intake slice lean: route, shipping mode, contents, weight, quantity, and category.
shipmentIntake.originCountryHelp: This starts from the vendor default origin, but you can change it for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.originCityHelp: Enter the origin city for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.destinationBranchPlaceholder: Select a saved pickup / destination office
shipmentIntake.destinationBranchHelp: Choose the real receiving branch this shipment is heading to. The saved branch country will fill automatically here.
shipmentIntake.destinationBranchError: Select the destination branch for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.destinationBranchCountryError: The selected branch is missing a saved country. Update that branch before creating this shipment.
shipmentIntake.destinationBranchEmptyBody: This vendor does not have any saved pickup / destination branches yet, so intake cannot target a real receiving office.
shipmentIntake.destinationCountryHelp: Choose the country where this shipment is going.
shipmentIntake.destinationCountryDerivedHelp: This country is derived from the selected destination branch so the shipment stays tied to a real receiving office.
shipmentIntake.destinationCityHelp: Enter the destination city for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.destinationCityAutoHelp: This city was prefilled from the selected branch. You can still adjust it if this shipment needs a more precise destination.
shipmentIntake.destinationCityManualHelp: Enter the destination city for this shipment. The selected branch does not have a saved city yet, so you can fill it here for now.
shipmentIntake.shippingModeHelp: Choose the mode the vendor will use for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.contentsDescriptionHelp: Keep the description practical enough for intake and later operations.
shipmentIntake.weightKgHelp: Use kilograms for this first shipment intake slice.
shipmentIntake.weightError: Enter a valid shipment weight greater than zero.
shipmentIntake.quantityHelp: Enter the number of parcels or items in this shipment.
shipmentIntake.quantityError: Enter a valid quantity greater than zero.
shipmentIntake.categoryHelp: Use one of the platform categories for intake consistency. Choose Other only when the shipment does not fit the preset list.
shipmentIntake.categoryOtherHelp: Add the category name you want staff to see when the shipment does not fit the preset list.
shipmentIntake.pricingSectionHelp: Use the vendor default pricing rule when it is available, then adjust the shipment price or add one discount if needed.
shipmentIntake.basePriceHelp: Enter the agreed base price for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.basePriceManualHelp: This vendor uses manual pricing by default, so enter the shipment base price directly.
shipmentIntake.basePriceMissingDefaultHelp: This vendor default pricing method needs a saved rate before auto-calculation can run, so enter the base price manually for now.
shipmentIntake.basePriceAwaitingWeightHelp: Enter the shipment weight to auto-calculate the base price from the vendor default per-kilogram rule.
shipmentIntake.basePriceAwaitingQuantityHelp: Enter the shipment quantity to auto-calculate the base price from the vendor default flat-fee rule.
shipmentIntake.basePriceAutoPerKgHelp: The base price is auto-calculated from the saved per-kilogram default, but you can still edit it for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.basePriceAutoFlatFeeHelp: The base price is auto-calculated from the saved flat fee per item, but you can still edit it for this shipment.
shipmentIntake.basePriceOverrideHelp: You overrode the default calculation for this shipment. The saved total below updates immediately.
shipmentIntake.discountAmountHelp: Optional. Enter one discount amount for this shipment and the total will update below.
shipmentIntake.discountAmountExceedsBaseError: Discount cannot be greater than the base price.
shipmentIntake.paymentStatusHelp: Choose unpaid or fully paid at intake. Record partial payment later from shipment detail when the exact collected amount is known.
shipmentIntake.pricingSummaryHelp: Review the current base price, discount, and total before creating the shipment.
shipmentIntake.referenceNoteHelp: Optional. Add a short note or reference only if it helps this intake record.
shipmentIntake.successBody: The shipment record, customer records, pricing summary, and tracking number were saved successfully.

shipmentList.title: Shipments
shipmentList.description: Browse and manage all your shipments.
shipmentList.searchPlaceholder: Search by tracking #, name, or phone...
shipmentList.emptyBody: No shipments match your current filters, or you have not created any yet.

shipmentDetail.title: Shipment detail
shipmentDetail.description: Open one shipment and see the real operational record, current state, pricing, route, and status timeline in one place.
shipmentDetail.loadingBody: Loading the shipment record and timeline.
shipmentDetail.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed to open shipment detail.
shipmentDetail.notFoundBody: We could not find a saved shipment for this vendor and route.
shipmentDetail.etaHelp: When this shipment is linked to a batch, the batch ETA is the ETA used here.
shipmentDetail.noLinkedBatch: Not linked to a batch yet
shipmentDetail.removeFromBatchLocked: This shipment can only be removed from the linked batch while that batch is still open.
shipmentDetail.routeSectionHelp: Use this section to confirm where the shipment started, where it is going, and which operational branch it is tied to.
shipmentDetail.destinationBranchMissing: No destination branch saved on this shipment
shipmentDetail.parcelSectionHelp: Keep the shipment contents, weight, quantity, category, and note readable for day-to-day operations.
shipmentDetail.pricingSectionHelp: This shows the saved intake pricing values for the shipment, including any discount and current payment state.
shipmentDetail.amountDueHelp: Amount due updates immediately from the shipment total and amount paid.
shipmentDetail.paymentMethodHelp: Optional. Save the payment method when the team knows how the customer paid for this shipment.
shipmentDetail.paymentNoteHelp: Optional. Save a short note only if it helps the team understand the current payment situation.
shipmentDetail.paymentActionDescription: Update the amount paid so far, the payment method, and any short payment note directly on the shipment record.
shipmentDetail.amountPaidHelp: Enter the total amount already collected for this shipment in the vendor's saved currency.
shipmentDetail.amountPaidError: Enter a valid amount paid that is zero or greater.
shipmentDetail.amountPaidExceedsTotalError: Amount paid cannot be greater than the shipment total.
shipmentDetail.paymentStatusAutoHelp: Payment status is calculated automatically from the amount paid you save here.
shipmentDetail.paymentUpdateSuccess: The shipment payment record was updated successfully.
shipmentDetail.batchActionsDescription: Use shipment detail to assign this shipment into an open batch or remove it from an open linked batch without leaving the record.
shipmentDetail.alreadyLinkedTitle: This shipment is already linked to a batch
shipmentDetail.alreadyLinkedBodyEditable: The linked batch is still open, so you can remove the shipment here if operations needs to correct the grouping.
shipmentDetail.alreadyLinkedBodyLocked: The linked batch is no longer open, so batch linkage is read-only from this shipment detail view.
shipmentDetail.notEligibleTitle: Batch assignment is not available right now
shipmentDetail.notEligibleBody: Only pending shipments that are not already linked to a batch can be assigned from this screen in the current operational model.
shipmentDetail.assignToExistingBody: Choose one of the vendor's open batches below to group this pending shipment into an operational run.
shipmentDetail.noAssignableBatches: No open batches are available for assignment right now. Create one below if this shipment needs to be grouped now.
shipmentDetail.createBatchTitle: Create a batch and assign this shipment
shipmentDetail.createBatchBody: If no suitable batch exists yet, create a new open batch here and assign this shipment immediately.
shipmentDetail.createAndAssignSuccess: The new batch was created and the shipment was assigned successfully.
shipmentDetail.createBatchNameHelp: Use a practical batch name the operations team will recognize later.
shipmentDetail.batchNameError: Enter the batch name before creating it from shipment detail.
shipmentDetail.etaDateError: Add the ETA date if you want to save an ETA time.
shipmentDetail.etaTimeError: Add the ETA time if you want to save an ETA date.
shipmentDetail.assignSuccess: The shipment was assigned to the selected batch successfully.
shipmentDetail.unassignSuccess: The shipment was removed from the linked batch successfully.
shipmentDetail.timelineDescription: Track the shipment's recorded operational status changes here as the shipment moves through batch flow.
shipmentDetail.timelineEmpty: No recorded timeline events are available for this shipment yet.

publicTracking.title: Track a shipment
publicTracking.description: Open a shipment by tracking number and view the real customer-safe status and route details without signing in.
publicTracking.searchDescription: Enter the shipment tracking number to view the current public tracking state.
publicTracking.emptyBody: Use the tracking number from the shipment receipt or label to open the public tracking view.
publicTracking.notFoundBody: We could not find a shipment that matches this tracking number.
publicTracking.customerSafeNotice: This page shows only customer-safe tracking information for this shipment.
publicTracking.etaHelp: ETA comes from the real batch operations record when it has been set.
publicTracking.routeSectionDescription: Use this section to confirm where the shipment started, where it is heading, and which receiving branch it is linked to.
publicTracking.destinationBranchMissing: No destination branch recorded on this shipment
publicTracking.summarySectionDescription: This public summary keeps only the basic shipment details that are safe to expose.
publicTracking.timelineDescription: Follow the real shipment status history recorded so far.
publicTracking.timelineEmpty: No public timeline entries are available for this shipment yet.

customerList.title: Customers
customerList.description: View and manage your customer contacts.
customerList.searchPlaceholder: Search by phone, name, or email...
customerList.emptyBody: Customers are created automatically when you process shipments.

customerDetail.name: Full name
customerDetail.shipmentsDescription: All shipments involving this customer as sender or receiver.
customerDetail.noShipments: No shipments found for this customer.
customerDetail.notFoundBody: This customer record does not exist or you do not have access.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Review and manage vendor partner applications from this admin panel.
admin.noAccessBody: You do not have admin privileges to access this page.
admin.loadFailed: We could not load the applications right now.
admin.emptyBody: There are no vendor applications matching this filter.
admin.confirmApprove: Are you sure you want to approve this application? A vendor record will be created.
admin.confirmReject: Provide a rejection reason before rejecting this application.
admin.confirmRequestInfo: Are you sure you want to request more information from this applicant?
admin.rejectionReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this application is being rejected.
admin.approveSuccess: Application approved and vendor record created.
admin.actionFailed: The action could not be completed right now.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Manage your plan and activate coupon codes to unlock Pro features.
subscription.noVendorBody: We could not find the active vendor record needed for subscription management.
subscription.loadFailed: We could not load your subscription status right now.
subscription.couponDescription: If you have a coupon code, enter it below to upgrade your plan.
subscription.couponFailed: We could not activate this coupon code.
subscription.stripePlaceholderBody: Online payment and Stripe subscription integration stay for a later slice. Use coupon codes for now.

shell.profileFallback: App-owned onboarding tables are not fully available yet, so routing is using the best available fallback.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This route is outside the current launch-core slice.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.description: Manage your team members and their access levels.
staff.inviteDescription: They will receive access when they sign up with this email.
staff.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this staff member?
staff.emptyDescription: Invite staff members to help manage your operations.

p2p.title: Peer-to-Peer Delivery
p2p.description: Send packages with travelers heading your way. Match with verified travelers who have spare luggage space on their flights.
p2p.feature1Desc: Post your delivery or your spare luggage space. Our algorithm matches senders with travelers.
p2p.feature2Desc: All travelers complete KYC verification with ID and selfie before they can carry packages.
p2p.feature3Desc: Coordinate directly with your matched traveler. Track handoff and delivery in real time.
p2p.signupSuccess: You're on the list! We'll notify you when P2P delivery launches.

busTickets.title: Bus Ticketing
busTickets.description: Online ticket sales for bus and transport agencies. Manage routes, schedules, and seat selection — all in one platform.
busTickets.feature1Desc: Sell tickets online with seat selection. Passengers book and pay from their phone.
busTickets.feature2Desc: Manage your routes, schedules, and pricing. Set up recurring services with just a few clicks.
busTickets.feature3Desc: Track vehicles, manage drivers, and generate passenger manifests with QR ticket validation.
busTickets.signupSuccess: You're on the list! We'll notify you when bus ticketing launches.

collectionPhoto.title: Collection proof photo
collectionPhoto.proRequired: Collection photos require a Pro subscription. Upgrade to unlock.

batchManifest.title: Batch Manifest
batchManifest.proRequired: Batch print requires a Pro subscription.

footer.tagline: The operating system for diaspora shipping.
footer.madeWith: Made with love for the diaspora
